Title: Add folders for saved replies
Internal Description: Agents can now create folders to organise saved replies. Folders appear in the saved replies panel and can be managed from the Saved Replies settings page. Existing saved replies remain uncategorised until moved into folders.
Customer Impact: Support agents can organise approved replies by topic, team, or workflow, making common responses easier to find during ticket handling.
Notes for Writer: Include in release notes. Update saved replies help article with steps for creating, renaming, moving, and deleting folders. Mention that existing replies are not automatically sorted.

Title: Add activity timeline to customer profiles
Internal Description: Customer profiles now include a chronological activity timeline showing recent tickets, internal notes, status changes, account updates, and key support events. Timeline data is read-only in this release.
Customer Impact: Agents can understand recent customer history before replying, reducing context switching and repeated questions.
Notes for Writer: Include in release notes. Update customer profile documentation. Clarify which activity types are included and that the timeline is read-only.

Title: Improve ticket search performance
Internal Description: Search indexing has been optimised for ticket ID, customer name, email address, and keyword searches. Internal testing shows faster results for workspaces with more than 100,000 tickets.
Customer Impact: Agents should spend less time waiting for search results, especially in larger workspaces.
Notes for Writer: Include as an improvement. Avoid exact performance claims unless verified. Consider wording such as “search results now load faster”.

Title: Reorganise ticket details panel
Internal Description: The ticket details panel has been redesigned. Priority, status, assignee, tags, customer plan, and SLA due time are now grouped into clearer sections. Some fields have moved but no ticket data has changed.
Customer Impact: Agents can scan important ticket information more quickly when triaging or responding to requests.
Notes for Writer: Include in release notes. Update ticket management article and screenshots. Mention that some fields have moved.

Title: Add first response time filter to reports
Internal Description: Reporting now includes a first response time filter. Team leads can filter report data by response time ranges to identify queues, teams, or ticket types with delayed first responses.
Customer Impact: Managers can more easily monitor support performance and identify areas needing attention.
Notes for Writer: Include in release notes. Update reporting help article. Explain where the filter appears and what it measures.

Title: Fix SLA due time timezone display
Internal Description: SLA due times previously used the agent browser timezone in some views. SLA due times now display according to the workspace timezone across ticket lists, ticket details, and reports.
Customer Impact: Distributed teams should see consistent SLA due times, reducing confusion around response deadlines.
Notes for Writer: Include in fixes. Update SLA article if timezone behaviour is documented. Be clear that this is a display fix, not a change to SLA calculation rules.

Title: Prevent duplicate tags after ticket merge
Internal Description: Merging tickets could sometimes display duplicate tags on the merged ticket record. Duplicate tags are now removed during the merge process.
Customer Impact: Ticket records stay cleaner and easier to scan after related customer requests are merged.
Notes for Writer: Include as a brief fix. Probably no KB update unless merge behaviour is documented.

Title: Keep bullet spacing in inserted saved replies
Internal Description: Saved replies containing bullet lists sometimes lost spacing when inserted into ticket replies. Formatting is now preserved when saved replies are added to a response.
Customer Impact: Agents no longer need to manually fix bullet formatting before sending common responses.
Notes for Writer: Include in fixes. Connects to saved replies but should not be presented as part of the new folder feature.

Title: Add separate permission for automation management
Internal Description: A new “Manage automations” permission allows admins to give selected users access to create, edit, pause, and delete automation rules without granting full workspace settings access. Existing admins keep their current access.
Customer Impact: Admins can delegate automation management more safely and avoid giving broader settings access than needed.
Notes for Writer: Include prominently. Update permissions and automation documentation. Mention that existing admin access is unchanged.

Title: Large CSV exports may be delayed during peak usage
Internal Description: CSV exports with more than 50,000 rows may take several minutes to generate during peak usage. The export completes in the background and users can continue working while it processes.
Customer Impact: Admins and team leads may need to allow extra time for large exports. Setting expectations may reduce support tickets.
Notes for Writer: Include in known issues. Consider adding a note to reporting/export documentation. Do not frame as a fix.
